SHORT NAME: RC_MODEL_REIMBRSMT_AMT 

LONG NAME: RC_MODEL_REIMBRSMT_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the Revenue Center Model Reimbursement Amount (REV-CNTR-
MODEL-AMT) that is present on any line item on all claim records included in the stay (i.e., sum of the 
REV-CNTR-MODEL-AMT reported on the claims that comprised the stay). 

For the participating hospitals in the PA
